mapper.insert: INSERT INTO order_item (order_id, product_id, product_name, unit_price, quantity, subtotal) VALUES (#{orderId}, #{productId}, #{productName}, #{unitPrice}, #{quantity}, #{subtotal})
mapper.select: SELECT id, order_id, product_id, product_name, unit_price, quantity, subtotal FROM order_item WHERE order_id = #{orderId} ORDER BY id ASC
